headline: Dreamology Labs Sues MSC Cruises, Seeking Nearly $1.9 Billion Over Alleged IP Theft
summary: Alessandra Maderni, founder and CEO of Dreamology Labs, Inc., filed a federal lawsuit in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Florida against MSC Cruises, MSC Cruises USA, and MSC Executive Chairman Pierfrancesco Vago, alleging a years-long pattern of fraudulent business inducement, breach of a nondisclosure agreement, and trade secret misappropriation.

content.title: Dreamology Labs Sues MSC Cruises, Seeking Nearly $1.9 Billion Over Alleged IP Theft
content.summary: Alessandra Maderni, founder and CEO of Dreamology Labs, Inc., filed a federal lawsuit in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Florida against MSC Cruises, MSC Cruises USA, and MSC Executive Chairman Pierfrancesco Vago, alleging a years-long pattern of fraudulent business inducement, breach of a nondisclosure agreement, and trade secret misappropriation.

thumbnail.caption: Pictured: (Left) MSC Cruises’ Pirates Cove Aquapark; (Right) Shipsomnia’s Tale of the Kraken. Exhibit 20 to the Complaint, filed in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Florida.
